meaning: n.习惯,风俗,<动词单用>海关,(封建制度下)定期服劳役,缴纳租税,自定义,<偶用作>关税v.定制,承接定做活的
examples: It was her custom to rise early.
The origin of the custom is obscure.
This quaint custom should be revived.
By the end of the year Digium was selling computer cards with custom boards and Asterisk software.
If you go to Hoi An, you can buy custom tailored shoes and clothes for good prices.
